hero.headline: A Grooming Atelier
hero.sub: An invitation-only sanctuary where precision meets poetry. Hand-sculpted cuts, rare spirits, and the quiet confidence of men who shape the world.

about.title: Where Ritual Meets
about.p1: NOIR & CO. is not a barber shop. It is a sanctuary — conceived in Tokyo, refined in Milan, and now open to the world's most discerning gentlemen.
about.p2: Every chair is a stage. Every cut, a signature. We believe grooming is the silent language of the elite, and we speak it fluently.

services.title: Crafted with
services.sub: Each service is an intimate ritual — measured, considered, and executed with cinematic precision.

items.name: Executive Cut
items.desc: A bespoke sculpting session tailored to the contours of your life.

items.name: Hot Towel Shave
items.desc: Straight-razor mastery with eucalyptus steam and rare sandalwood oils.

items.name: Beard Sculpting
items.desc: Architectural beard design with premium botanical tonics.

items.name: Royal Ritual
items.desc: The ultimate indulgence — cut, shave, facial, scalp therapy, and whiskey.

gallery.title: Moments of
gallery.sub: Step inside. Each frame tells the story of men who understand the power of presence.

booking.title: Reserve Your
booking.sub: Our chairs are limited. Your time is not.
booking.successMsg: A confirmation has been sent to your inbox. Our concierge will contact you shortly.

team.title: Hands That
team.sub: Trained in Paris, refined in Milan. Each barber is a craftsman of character.

items.quote: The only chair I trust before a board meeting. Precision is not a service here — it is a philosophy.
items.name: Alexander Chen
items.title: CEO, Helios Capital

items.quote: I've been groomed in London, Paris, New York. NOIR & CO. is in a category of its own.
items.name: James Whitaker
items.title: Formula 1 Driver

items.quote: A sanctuary for men who value silence, craft, and the finest scotch.
items.name: Khalid Rahman
items.title: Fashion Entrepreneur

membership.title: Become a
membership.sub: An invitation to a life of considered luxury. Limited to 500 gentlemen worldwide.

app.title: Your Atelier,
app.sub: Book, manage, and experience NOIR & CO. from anywhere in the world.

footer.mission: An invitation-only grooming atelier for the modern gentleman.
footer.newsletterSub: Quarterly dispatches on craft, culture, and the considered life.
